task_objective: Fix template UI issues related to truncation warnings and correlations metadata
design_decisions: Moved Nullity Matrix truncation warning inside the NullityMatrix component to ensure it appears below the header.
Filtered out '_metadata' from correlations tab buttons in both themes.
Corrected heatmap data path in ydata theme to pass the full matrix dictionary (including metadata) to CorrelationMatrixComponent.
results: All reported issues resolved and verified. Full test suite passes with 90% coverage.
